meta.name: OGZ Intelligence Layer
meta.description: The distilled brain of the platform. Every agent, brief, score, and recommendation draws from this.
meta.generated_from: 4315 observations across 42 Saudi Instagram accounts in 6 sectors

universal_rules.rule: ALWAYS use 'youth_culture_collab' — 100% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'heritage_storytelling_hook' — 93% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'overhead_tabletop_spread' — 88% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'cultural_object_hero' — 86% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'community_pride_statement' — 85% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'customer_voice_ugc' — 84% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'close_up_macro_texture' — 83% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'giveaway_contest' — 83% high engagement across all sectors
ALWAYS use 'model_centered_frontal_portrait' — 82% high engagement across all sectors

caption_rules.rule: Write in arabic — 30% high vs 18% for bilingual
Caption length matters — medium (50-200 chars) performs best

why_analysis.hypothesis: Works because of warmth emotion + lifestyle pillar delivered in warm_studio lighting
Works because of unknown emotion + unknown pillar delivered in warm_studio lighting
Works because of appetite emotion + lifestyle pillar delivered in warm_studio lighting
Works because of unknown emotion + unknown pillar delivered in warm_studio lighting
Works because of unknown emotion + unknown pillar delivered in flat_graphic lighting
Works because of anticipation emotion + entertainment pillar delivered in natural_daylight lighting
Works because of appetite emotion + product pillar delivered in cold_studio lighting
Works because of anticipation emotion + community pillar delivered in warm_studio lighting
Works because of appetite emotion + lifestyle pillar delivered in dramatic_moody lighting

ramadan.arc_description: Start with anticipation (60%), build to urgency, close with warmth/gratitude

founding_day.arc_description: Start with pride (89%), build to appetite, close with warmth/gratitude

national_day.arc_description: Start with pride (28%), build to pride, close with warmth/gratitude

eid_al_fitr.arc_description: Start with anticipation (80%), build to warmth, close with warmth/gratitude

jeddah_season.arc_description: Start with pride (79%), build to urgency, close with warmth/gratitude

riyadh_season.arc_description: Start with pride (36%), build to anticipation, close with warmth/gratitude

evergreen.arc_description: Start with anticipation (48%), build to warmth, close with warmth/gratitude

sequencing_rules.rule: Start campaigns with anticipation (45% high) — tease what's coming
Peak with pride or entertainment (36-45%) — the hero moment
Close with community or warmth (25-33%) — gratitude, togetherness
Never start with aspiration (11%) — it's the weakest opener
Alternate community and product pillars — avoid product streaks >2 posts
Use carousel for hero moments, reel for teasers, image for closers
Front-load heritage patterns in Ramadan (first week), shift to brand by week 3

warm_studio_heritage.equipment: warm gels, heritage props (dallah, dates, incense)

golden_hour_outdoor.equipment: reflector, golden hour timing (30 min window)

closed_loop.description: Track actual campaign results → compare to predictions → auto-calibrate intelligence
data_needed: patterns_used: what patterns were in the brief
actual_engagement: what actually happened (likes, comments, reach)
client_satisfaction: did the client like it (1-5)
feedback_rules: If actual > predicted by >20%: upgrade pattern confidence
If actual < predicted by >20%: downgrade pattern, investigate why
If pattern fatigue detected: add to fatigue curve, set max_uses
If new pattern emerges from client work: add to corpus
If client satisfaction low despite high engagement: engagement ≠ brand fit
closed_loop.status: framework_ready — needs campaign tracking pipeline to activate

july.prediction: Low engagement period (11%). Focus on evergreen content. Avoid religious sensitivity.

august.prediction: Recovery period. Build anticipation for National Day (Sep 23).

september.prediction: HIGH opportunity (40%). Heritage + pride. Front-load cultural content week of Sep 23.

october.prediction: High volume but low quality period (15%). Differentiation critical — avoid generic event coverage.

november.prediction: Continued season. Fatigue risk. Switch to community content.

december.prediction: STRONG opportunity (45%). Underserved by competitors. Go bold.

autonomous.description: Self-improving pipeline with minimal human intervention
human_gates: New pattern discovery → Mohamed approves before adding
Cultural rule changes → Mohamed + Cultural Advisor approve
Pattern removal → never automatic, always human decision
autonomous.self_improvement_loop: daemon extracts → analytics rebuild → intelligence regenerates → API serves updated rules → agents use new context → campaign results feed back → intelligence improves
autonomous.status: partially_autonomous — daemon + analytics + sync running. Closed loop needs campaign data.

cultural_moat.description: What no foreign company can replicate

moat_components.asset: 4315 Saudi Instagram observations with cultural annotations
80-field cultural spec per sector (modesty, dialect, heritage, props)
Arabic-first caption intelligence (dialect detection, phrase analysis)
5 CD brain methodologies calibrated from Saudi benchmark data
Occasion-specific playbooks (Ramadan, Founding Day, National Day)
Sector × occasion × emotion × format interaction data

cultural_moat.competitive_advantage: Foreign tools can do generic AI content. They cannot do Saudi-native content. The cultural intelligence — forbidden lists, dialect rules, heritage patterns, occasion arcs, modesty thresholds — is the moat. It compounds with every campaign.
strengthening_strategy: Every new campaign adds observations → deeper intelligence
Every new sector adds coverage → wider moat
Every cultural shift we capture first → temporal advantage
Arabic-first approach → linguistic moat (LLMs are English-biased)

revenue_intelligence.description: Connect content to business outcomes — optimize for money, not likes

engagement_to_revenue_proxy.high_engagement_post: 3x more likely to drive profile visits
engagement_to_revenue_proxy.carousel_high_eng: highest save rate → long-term brand recall

client_value_metrics: Brief-to-production time: how fast can we deliver?
Engagement prediction accuracy: does our score match reality?
Client renewal rate: do clients come back?

pricing_intelligence.high_confidence_brief: Premium pricing — brain predicts >70% high engagement
pricing_intelligence.low_data_sector: Discount pricing — building intelligence for new sector

revenue_intelligence.status: framework_ready — needs real client revenue data to activate
